// Pom1 Save : LittleTower.txt
// Little Tower v1.0 - Apple 1 Adventure Game
// Written by A.Verhille (C) September 2000
// Updated April 2026
//
// Load the program with File - Load Memory ...
// Then type 300R to execute Little Tower
// Have Fun :-)
